items.summaryShort: Presentation: Designing AI Platforms for Reliability: Tools for Certainty, Agents for Discovery. Aaron Erickson explains how NVIDIA designs and tests purpose-built AI agent hierarchies.

items.title: Truecaller clashes with India's telecom regulator over anti-spam rules
items.summaryShort: Truecaller clashes with India's telecom regulator over anti-spam rules. The caller ID company says users are increasingly ignoring and blocking calls from India's dedicated business number series.

items.title: Despite ‘misgivings,' judge approves Elon Musk's $1.5M SEC settlement
items.summaryShort: Despite ‘misgivings,' judge approves Elon Musk's $1.5M SEC settlement. The saga of Musk's tussle with the SEC over how he disclosed his growing stake in Twitter (now X) has come to an end.

items.title: Lovable reportedly in talks to double its valuation to $13.2B
items.summaryShort: Lovable reportedly in talks to double its valuation to $13.2B. The $300 million round is expected to be led by Menlo Ventures, Sifted reported.
